docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY CUADRA, CESAR AS TO DEFENDANT DUARTE, IMARA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-24-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-24-2016 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-25-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CESAR CUADRA. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN. 25, 2017 AT 10:00. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $75.00) SERVED NOV-12-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DUARTE, IMARA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-25-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-25-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CESAR CUADRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IMARA DUARTE IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK; J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUADRA, CESAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUARTE, IMARA $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,625.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
(SC-220) REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT DUARTE, IMARA
(SC-221) RESPONSE TO REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUADRA, CESAR

ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS (SC-222): [X] THE REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS IS APPROVED AND THE COURT ORDERS: PAYMENTS OF $650.00 ON THE 10TH DAY OF EACH MONTH, STARTING APRIL 10, 2017 UNTIL (DATE OF FINAL PAYMENT) SEPTEMBER 10, 2017. AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT $375.00.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $118.19 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT DUARTE, IMARA
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CUADRA, CESAR AS TO DEFENDANT DUARTE, IMARA
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $4,364.86 FOR THE WRIT ISSUED ON: 05/25/2017 AS TO DEFENDANT DUARTE, IMARA
